NewsTicker.text: 🇱🇰 Sri Lanka’s Premier Martial Arts Academy - BLACK DRAGON JEET KUNE DO

Classes.title: Discover our Classes
Classes.description: Three core martial arts, one academy — train with purpose.

About.body: Black Dragon Jeet Kune Do is Sri Lanka’s #1 martial arts training academy, dedicated to developing strength, discipline, and confidence through world-class training. Specializing in Jeet Kune Do, Kung Fu, and Wushu, the academy blends traditional techniques with modern combat principles.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Building strength, discipline, and champions through professional martial arts training since 2010.
AboutPage.heroLeftAlt: Martial arts coaches training with students
AboutPage.legacyImageAlt: Martial arts coaches training with students
AboutPage.legacyBody1: Founded in 2010 by Grandmaster Elias Thorne, Apex Martial Arts Academy was built on a singular philosophy: discipline equals freedom. What started as a small garage dojo has evolved into a premier training center for future champions.
AboutPage.legacyBody2: Our growth is rooted in our commitment to authentic technique and mental fortitude. We don't just teach combat; we cultivate character, resilience, and a warrior's spirit in every student who walks through our doors.

FacilitiesPage.heroSubtitle: Train in a professional environment built for performance, safety, and comfort.
FacilitiesPage.introTitle: WORLD CLASS GYM FACILITIES in Sri Lanka
FacilitiesPage.introBody: Experience a professional training environment designed to support every level of martial artist. Our facilities are equipped with modern training spaces, high-quality equipment, and dedicated areas for Jeet Kune Do, Kung Fu, and Wushu practice. From spacious training halls to safe and well-maintained equipment zones, every detail is built to enhance performance, safety, and comfort.
FacilitiesPage.benefits1Body: Enhance your strength, endurance, and overall fitness through dynamic martial arts training. Our programs combine techniques from Jeet Kune Do, Kung Fu, and Wushu to deliver full-body workouts that improve flexibility, speed, and coordination. Every session is designed to build both physical power and mental focus, helping you achieve a healthier and more disciplined lifestyle.
FacilitiesPage.benefits2Body: Train with clear rules, qualified supervision, and safe equipment standards. Our structured sessions prioritize control, awareness, and correct technique—so you can improve with confidence in a disciplined environment.
FacilitiesPage.benefits3Body: Develop precision, discipline, and control through traditional weapons training. Students learn the fundamentals and advanced techniques of classical martial arts weapons, improving coordination, focus, and combat awareness in a safe and structured environment.

marcus.name: Marcus Sterling
marcus.quote: Joining Apex was the best decision for my fitness and focus. The coaches are world-class and really push you to your limits.

sarah.name: Sarah Jenkins
sarah.quote: As a woman, the self-defense classes here gave me so much confidence. It’s a very supportive and respectful environment.

david.name: David Chen
david.quote: The BJJ program is incredible. Technique focus is high, and the community is like a second family to me now.

amina.name: Amina Perera
amina.quote: The coaching style is detailed and patient. My stamina, timing, and confidence improved within weeks—especially during pad work.

ravi.name: Ravi Dissanayake
ravi.quote: Great energy, disciplined training, and a welcoming community. The classes feel structured and safe while still pushing you to grow.

ClassesPage.heroSubtitle: Choose your path, train with purpose, and master your discipline.

kungfu.description: The original art of discipline. Focuses on fluid movements, internal energy, and ancient technical mastery.
kungfu.alt: Traditional Kung Fu practitioner performing a precise movement in a bright minimal studio

jkd.description: Founded by Bruce Lee. The way of the intercepting fist prioritizes directness and adaptability.
jkd.alt: Close up of mixed martial arts training with heavy bags and dynamic lighting

wushu.description: High-intensity Chinese martial arts combining explosive power with extreme acrobatic aesthetics.
wushu.alt: Acrobatic Wushu performer mid-air against a high-contrast dark background

ClassesPage.ctaTitle: Start Your Martial Arts Journey Today

KidsAcademyPage.heroTitle: Martial arts that helps students thrive
KidsAcademyPage.heroSubtitle: Our kids program builds focus, discipline, confidence, and respect—skills that support learning, friendships, and a strong mindset at school.
KidsAcademyPage.whyTitle: Why martial arts matters for students
KidsAcademyPage.whyBody: Martial arts isn’t only about fighting. It teaches self-control, goal setting, and positive habits that support education and personal growth.

benefits.disciplineBody: Students learn to follow instructions, respect rules, and stay consistent. These habits carry into school work, homework, and daily routines.
benefits.confidenceBody: Every small improvement—stance, balance, technique—helps kids believe in themselves. Confidence grows through effort, not comparison.
benefits.stressBody: Training is a healthy outlet for energy and emotions. Breathing, movement, and focus help students feel calmer and more in control.

KidsAcademyPage.safeTitle: A safe, structured, and fun environment
KidsAcademyPage.safeBody: Students practice with age-appropriate drills, clear boundaries, and supportive coaching. They learn respect, teamwork, and how to handle challenges with a calm mind.

Cta.title: Start Your Martial Arts Journey Today
